mapper.select: select * from users where username = #{username} limit 1
select * from users where phone = #{phone} order by id asc limit 1
mapper.update: update users set last_login_ip = #{ip}, last_login_time = #{time}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select status from users where id = #{id}
select role from users where id = #{id}
